results.title: Trump Unravels in Alarming Truth Social Rampage
results.description: Kevin Dietsch/Getty Images President Donald Trump has unleashed a series of nonsensical posts to kick off his Saturday morning. The 79-year-old president had been scheduled to spend the weekend golfing in New Jersey, but as the region is seeing heavy rain this weekend, his plans appear to have shifted to posting AI-generated fantasies on Truth Social. Several of the posts appear to be thinly veiled statements on his threats to take over various sovereign states, including Greenland. Read more at The Daily Beast.
